llm.summary: The RCA task is complete in substance. The repeated failure is isolated to loopback unavailability before the inspector health check, the fallback now covers local ECONNREFUSED for 127.0.0.1 HTTP targets, the required npm run inspector:mock check is recorded passing, and the RCA plan/parent log document the resolution and normal return path.
satisfied_exit_criteria: The blocker signature is explicitly documented as deterministic_failure|npm-run-inspector-mock|no-path-details, with saved evidence showing npm run inspector:mock stopped during Health and operator config with Inspector failed: fetch failed.
scripts/mock-inspector.mjs now routes loopback EPERM or ECONNREFUSED failures through the local route-handler fallback while preserving non-loopback and HTTPS behavior.
The deterministic check summary for the RCA task records npm run inspector:mock passing with Inspector completed successfully.
The RCA task metadata has next_task_on_success set to inspector-full-server-features, and promote-task.mjs clears parent blocker metadata on RCA return without manual queue edits.
The parent task progress log records the RCA resolution and says queue return remains through the RCA task next_task_on_success path.
